boundary_binding.action_boundary: replacement shipment allowed after RMA approval
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records do not close boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: RMA match missing for SKU and order
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: RMA approval must match SKU and order

final_answer: Source control records do not close the execution boundary. The required RMA approval matching the SKU and order is missing or unconfirmed, so the replacement shipment cannot proceed yet. Escalate for exact-match verification before any commerce action is executed.
open_blockers: RMA approval must match SKU and order
